[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001110 4
1 000000100 1
2 001100000 2
3 101100110 5
4 101101111 7
5 001001101 4
6 001100110 4
7 101100010 4

23 32 000000000 a

45 54 101100010 4 match 7

67 76 000000110 2
70 07 000000110 2

13 31 001100000 2 match 2

25 52 100000001 2
36 63 001000000 1

50 05 101100010 4 match 7
61 16 001001110 4 match 0
72 27 000000100 1 match 1

26 62 000001101 3
37 73 000000000 a
